title: CheeseCraft
description: A Fabric and Forge mod that adds 7 types of cheese to Minecraft.
body:
**Cheesecraft** Is The Best Mod For Anyone Who Loves Cheese. It Adds Seven Types Of Cheese That Have Varrients And Stair-Slabs. The Mod Is **Only For 1.20.1**.
## 
## **Types:**
- Normal/Yellow Cheese
- Cheddar Cheese
- Blue Cheese
- Moldy Cheese
- Gouda Cheese
- Brown Cheese
- Moon Cheese
 
## **Varients:**
- Smooth [Stairs & Slabs]
- Cut [Stairs & Slabs]
- Brick [Stairs & Slabs]
- Tile
- Chisled
## 
## **Crafting:**
- Normal, obtained by mining cheese ore
- Blue, Normal+Mold
- Moldy, Normal+2 Mold
- Gouda, Normal+Wax
- Brown, Normal+Sugar
- Cheddar, Normal+Salt
- Moon, Normal+Cobblestone
- Salt, Found Underground
- Mold, 1 Piece Of Bread
